questions.question: How many prime numbers are between 20 and 40?
What is 3/8 + 5/6?
What is 35% of 80?
The ratio of cats to dogs is 5:3. If there are 24 dogs, how many cats are there?
Simplified form of √75 is:
If 3(2x − 1) = 4x + 7, then x = ?
If a + b = 8 and a − b = 2, what is ab?
For what value(s) of x does x² = 4x − 4?
If −2 < x < 4, what is the range of 3x − 1?
A car travels A→B at 40 mph and B→A at 60 mph. What is the average speed for the round trip?
questions.explanation: Use harmonic mean for equal distances: 2×40×60/(40+60) = 4800/100 = 48 mph.

questions.question: A can do a job in 10 days, B in 15 days. After A works 5 days alone, B joins. How many more days to finish?
questions.explanation: A completes 5/10 = 1/2 in 5 days. Remaining = 1/2. Together: 1/10+1/15 = 1/6 per day. Time = (1/2)/(1/6) = 3 days.

questions.question: $3,000 at 6% simple interest. How many years to earn $900 in interest?
Cost price = $150, selling price = $120. What is the loss percent?
questions.explanation: Loss = $30. Loss % = 30/150 × 100 = 20%. Base is always the cost price.

questions.question: Data: 8, 12, 14, 16, 20. What is the mean?
If each value in a data set is multiplied by 3, which measures are also multiplied by 3?
questions.explanation: Multiplying all values by k scales mean, median, mode, and standard deviation all by k.

questions.question: Rolling a fair die twice. What is P(sum ≥ 11)?
P(A) = 0.6 and P(A and B) = 0.3. What is P(B|A)?
How many ways to arrange 4 books selected from 6 different books on a shelf?
A class elects a president, secretary, and treasurer from 10 students. How many possible outcomes?
The sum of two consecutive integers is 47. What is the product of the two integers?
What is the remainder when 3¹⁰⁰ is divided by 8?
Two alloys contain gold: one is 40% gold, the other 60%. How much of each is needed to make 100g of 54% gold alloy?
With a 50-mph tailwind, a plane covers 3,000 miles in 5 hours. Flying the same distance against the same wind, how long does it take?
questions.explanation: With wind: speed = 3000/5 = 600 mph. Still-air speed = 600−50 = 550. Against wind: 550−50 = 500 mph. Time = 3000/500 = 6 hours.

questions.question: At what annual simple interest rate does $5,000 need to be invested to earn $1,200 in 4 years?
